CustomField.formula: IF( AND( IsSupplier__c, OR( ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Inner Firm'), CONTAINS(UPPER(Name), 'ВЗЦ') ) ), 'CORPORATE', IF( AND( IsSupplier__c, OR( $RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Scrap_Supplier', AND( $RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Customer', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Inner Firm')) ) ) ), 'COMMERCIAL', '' ) )
CustomField.label: Тип постачальника
